title: KATSU 1/2 Inch Socket Set 12Pcs, 10-24mm Metric Drive with 24-Teeth Quick-Released Ratchet Wrench and 5" Extension Bar, High Grade Chrome Vanadium Steel, Auto Repairing Garage Tool 420343
features: Manufactured from high-grade chrome vanadium Cr-V steel, heat treated and plated with corrosion resistance chrome satin finish, durable and long life service

Easy-to-use, thumb-operated, reverse-geared, with 24-teeth and only needs a 5-degree swing arc to reach the exact tightness, push button ball bearing built in allowing quick release and rapid socket change
Most-used 1/2" metric sockets from 10mm to 24mm for the different requirements in your daily life
Organizer rack Packed including 10pcs of metric sockets, 5" extension bar and 1/2" 24-Teeth quick-released ratchet wrench
Most commonly used for various DIY assembly and fixing tasks as well as basic car maintenance and repair, etc
description: Product Description Specifications: Manufactured from high-carbon steel for increased durability Sizes are all stamped for easy identification Soft grip handle for increased comfort and knurled sockets to provide a secure grip High quality reversible quick release ratchet handle Comes with a plastic holder to keep your sockets and ratchet handle secure, clean, organized, and easy to find when you need them. Never worry about damaged or misshapen tools again Hang securely in your garage or shed to be within reach and keep your workstation clutter-free Package Includes: 10 x 1/2" drive: 10, 11, 12, 13, 15, 17, 19, 21, 22, 24 mm 1 x Extension bar 5" 1 x 1/2" quick release ratchet spanner KATSU 12Pcs Metric Socket Set Cr-V Steel & 1/4" Quick Release Ratchet + Holder KATSU 12Pcs Metric Socket Set Cr-V Steel & 3/8" Quick Release Ratchet + Holder KATSU 12Pcs Metric Socket Set Cr-V Steel & 1/2" Quick Release Ratchet + Holder KATSU 12Pcs Metric Socket Set Cr-V Steel & 1/2" Quick Release Ratchet+Steel Case KATSU 32Pcs Metric Socket Set High-Grade Steel & 1/2" Ratchet + Carrying Case Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 880 4.5 out of 5 stars 880 4.5 out of 5 stars 880 4.5 out of 5 stars 172 4.9 out of 5 stars 13 Price £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £18.99 £ 18 . 99 — no data £35.99 £ 35 . 99 Item 1/4" 3/8" 1/2" 1/2" 1/2"
